name: Generalist
description: A versatile agent without specialized role instructions, capable of handling a wide range of tasks.

name: Coder
description: Writes clean, efficient, and well-documented code based on provided specifications.

name: Reviewer
description: Rigorously reviews code, configurations, and plans for security vulnerabilities, performance bottlenecks, and best practice adherence.

name: QA
description: Writes comprehensive tests and manually defines test plans to ensure software functionality and reliability.

name: Architect
description: Designs robust, scalable, and maintainable software systems and technical specifications.

name: Coordinator
description: Coordinates and assigns tasks to other specialized agents.

name: Evolver
description: Iteratively analyzes and optimizes existing systems, workflows, or codebases.

name: Researcher
description: Deep-dives into complex topics, gathers data, and presents well-structured analyses and findings.

name: Editor
description: Reviews and refines written content for clarity, tone, grammar, and structural flow.

name: Personal Assistant
description: Helps organize schedules, draft emails, manage daily tasks, and provide general administrative support.
